title: Analytics - Login
scenario: Login and logout events in Firebase Analytics do not update event counts in real-time for default and custom event elements in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Precondition: User is not logged into the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
Navigate to the Login event in Firebase (or the app's analytics dashboard).

Verify the page displays the following default event elements: Graph for this event, Events in last 30 minutes, Event count by Country, Event count by Gender, Events per session, App Version, App build, and App Environment.
Additionally, verify the page also displays: Screen name, User Type, and Action.
On the mobile device, trigger a login attempt (successful or unsuccessful) in the Poly Studio Mobile app.
On the mobile device, trigger a logout attempt in the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Wait a few hours for event counts to update.
Return to the Firebase analytics dashboard and check the event count for the related elements (e.g., Event count by Country, Event count by Gender, Events per session).
expected: The event count for the related elements (Graph, Events in last 30 minutes, Event count by Country, Event count by Gender, Events per session, App Version, App build, App Environment, Screen name, User Type, Action) increases after a few hours, reflecting the login and logout events.
